commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 35% while the sportsbook consensus heavily favors USA at 60%, a 27-percentage-point gap on the home win. The market also compresses the draw to 23%, well below the model's 32%. This divergence likely reflects information the model cannot access—recent form, injuries, or lineup changes for either side could shift underlying strength estimates substantially in one direction. The dashboard flags this as a signal worth monitoring rather than evidence that either source has misread the match.
